name: tfl-3d-transport-map
description: A 3D live map of London Underground line status, built on TfL open data.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
